question: Which candidate in the New York election campaign had the most sponsors that sponsored through agents in 2021? How many years did that candidate serve on the New York City Council? Please return only the number in the format [Answer].

1.fact:
import io
import pandas as pd
import boto3

source = 'datagov/2021-intermediaries/files/rows.txt'
bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
obj = boto3.client("s3").get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
df = pd.read_csv(
    io.BytesIO(obj["Body"].read()),
    usecols=["ELECTION", "CANDFIRST", "CANDMI", "CANDLAST", "EMPNAME"],
    dtype=str,
    low_memory=False,
)

filtered = df[df["ELECTION"].fillna("").str.strip().eq("2021")].copy()
filtered["candidate"] = filtered[["CANDFIRST", "CANDMI", "CANDLAST"]].fillna("").apply(
    lambda row: " ".join(part.strip() for part in row if str(part).strip()),
    axis=1,
)
filtered["EMPNAME"] = filtered["EMPNAME"].fillna("").str.strip()
filtered = filtered[(filtered["candidate"] != "") & (filtered["EMPNAME"] != "")]
counts = filtered.groupby("candidate")["EMPNAME"].nunique().sort_values(ascending=False)
answer = str(counts.index[0])
1.subquestion: Which candidate in the New York election campaign has the most sponsors that sponsored through agents in 2021?

2.fact: Bradford Scott Lander (born July 8, 1969) is an American politician and urban planner who has served as the 45th New York City comptroller since 2022. A progressive Democrat, Lander was elected to the New York City Council in 2009, serving for twelve years, later serving as Deputy Leader for Policy.
2.subquestion: How many years did <hop 1 answer> serve on the New York City Council?
